description: End-to-end untargeted quantification across multiple LC-MS samples: detect features (or load featureXML) -> RT alignment (MapAlignmentAlgorithmPoseClustering) -> consensus linking (FeatureGroupingAlgorithmQT) -> consensusXML + a wide quantification matrix CSV.
rules: INPUTS is a space-separated list of 2+ mzML and/or featureXML files
writes study.consensusXML and study_quant_matrix.csv under record_store
vendors detect_features_metabo.py for the mzML detection path
tunable via RT_TOL, MZ_TOL, MZ_UNIT, PPM, NOISE
usage: Set INPUTS (space-separated mzML/featureXML, 2+). Optional RT_TOL/MZ_TOL/MZ_UNIT/PPM/NOISE. Output: study.consensusXML (+ study_quant_matrix.csv).
limitation: Requires pyOpenMS 3.5.0 (Python 3.9+) to produce real content; if absent the porter still creates study.consensusXML and records the reason.
